cards.title: Attention
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep the misconception target, but make feedback explicitly say current context can include prompt, retrieved text, and response-so-far tokens.
cards.notes: Correct concept and stage placement. Needs a token-to-token relevance visual using the actual sentence rather than generic t1-t6 nodes.

cards.title: MLP
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep the correct answer but add a stronger distractor about mixing across token positions to test the attention/MLP distinction.
cards.notes: Needs a clearer expansion of multi-layer perceptron and a stronger visual showing per-token feature reshaping after attention.

cards.title: Layers
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep hidden states as the target, but make feedback explain repeated attention-plus-MLP blocks and fixed weights during inference.
cards.notes: Belongs after MLP and before Hidden States. Best CSS 3D candidate in Workday because a stack can teach repeated blocks without heavy libraries.

cards.title: Hidden States
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep the internal-numbers misconception target, but add answer feedback that separates hidden states from embeddings, weights, and memory.
cards.notes: Most abstract card in the stage. Needs a stronger embedding-to-hidden-state comparison and explicit temporary context-shaped language.
